name: Ricoh GR III Reguler Street Edition Digital Camera
description:
Street Edition The GR III Street Edition is a distinct kit featuring a special edition camera body along with a custom external viewfinder, ring cap, and hand strap.
Camera body has a unique "asphalt-like" surface texture, which is achieved by a multi-layer spray process that provides a smooth-but-non-slippery feel.

features.General Features: 24.2MP APS-C CMOS Sensor | GR Engine 6 | 28mm f/2.8 Lens (35mm Equivalent) | 3-Axis Shake Reduction System | Ricoh GR III Street Edition Digital Camera | GN-1 Ring Cap (Street Edition) | Ricoh GN-1 Ring Cap (Black) | Ricoh DB-110 Rechargeable Lithium-Ion Battery (3.6V, 1350mAh) | Ricoh I-USB166 USB Cable | Power Adapter | AC Plug | Hot Shoe Cover | Hand Strap
